channel.title: GitHub Fluent Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Fluent in GitHub

item.title: an-anime-team/an-anime-game-launcher
item.description: An Anime Game launcher for Linux with telemetry disabling

item.title: stephanrauh/ngx-extended-pdf-viewer
item.description: A full-blown PDF viewer for Angular 16, 17, and beyond
